summary: Iteration 14 - AI Chat Agent feature fully tested and working. All backend APIs (POST /api/ai/chat, GET/DELETE sessions) pass. Frontend chat panel with floating button, multi-turn conversation, session history, and Ctrl+K command bar all functional.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with floating chat button visible (bottom-right, sparkles icon)
Click chat toggle button - chat panel opens (420px wide, slides from bottom-right)
Chat panel header shows 'DD Planner AI' with History, New Chat, Close buttons
4 suggested queries appear when chat is empty
Type message and send - AI responds with project data analysis (5-10 sec latency)
Follow-up message works - multi-turn context maintained
History button shows chat sessions list with titles and dates
New Chat button resets conversation - suggested queries reappear
Close button closes panel - floating button reappears
Ctrl+K still opens command bar (existing feature preserved)
Backend: POST /api/ai/chat returns session_id, response, message_count
Backend: GET /api/ai/chat/sessions/{id} returns full message history
Backend: DELETE /api/ai/chat/sessions/{id} deletes session and returns 404 on re-fetch
Backend: Chat endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Resource user (henry@ddconsult.tech) can also use chat feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 AI Chat Agent feature verified: 1) Floating chat button (sparkles icon) in bottom-right corner. 2) Chat panel 420px wide with DD Planner AI header. 3) Multi-turn conversation with session memory works. 4) AI analyzes live project/resource/budget data. 5) Session history with load/delete functionality. 6) New Chat resets conversation. 7) Ctrl+K command bar still works. 8) Uses emergentintegrations library for LLM calls (not raw OpenAI). 9) AI response takes 5-10 seconds due to LLM latency.

session_management.history_view: Shows sessions with titles and dates

ai_integration.context: Loads all projects, resources, allocations, timesheets

GET /api/ai/chat/sessions.returns: List of user's sessions (most recent first)

ui_design_review.chat_button: Dark background (#0B1220), white sparkles icon, hover scale effect
ui_design_review.chat_panel: White background, rounded top-left corner, shadow
ui_design_review.header: Dark background (#0B1220), white text, Space Grotesk font
ui_design_review.messages: Blue bubbles for user, grey for assistant, Bot icon for AI
ui_design_review.input: Clean input with send button, disabled during loading
